summary: Frontend testing of LiveProgressModal UI enhancements completed successfully. All 9 features verified: Tab renames (Overview→AI Analysis, Inspection→Q&A Details), Verification tab merged into Vehicle & RTO, Share Report button, Recommended Purchase Price with note, Market Research Data with website-wise prices, Category-wise progress grid, and editable answers with predefined options.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: LiveProgressModal.jsx is well-structured with proper component organization
Tab order correctly implemented: AI Analysis, Vehicle & RTO, Repairs, Q&A Details
Share Report section properly placed at top of AI Analysis tab
Market Research Data section shows website-wise breakdown with source names and prices
Category-wise Progress grid displays correctly with progress bars and percentages
Edit functionality for answers uses predefined options dropdown as specified
seed_data_creation: Used existing inspection: Priya Patel with KA05CD5678 (has market_price_research data with 4 CarDekho sources)
